title: 20 people in Montes Claros-MG observed 8 star-like UFOs during 90 minutes [1986]
excerpt: June 5th, 1986. Time: 12:00. Duration: 90 minutes. In Montes Claros, State of Minas Gerais, about 20 people observed, for an hour and a half, 8 [eight] unidentified flying objects in the shape of a “star; like a planet (Venus) – fixed light point”, four of which were smaller. The UFOs were silver in color […]
text_preview: June 5th, 1986. Time: 12:00. Duration: 90 minutes. In Montes Claros, State of Minas Gerais, about 20 people observed, for an hour and a half, 8 [eight] unidentified flying objects in the shape of a “star; like a planet (Venus) – fixed light point”, four of which were smaller. The UFOs were silver in color and flew slowly in formation of “Cruzeiro do Sul” [Southern Star], and then, leaving the formation and making random movements. The sighting was done in good visibility conditions. Complementary Data: “At 12:20Z, Montes Claros [MG] called us via TF2 / 348 {CV R.} informing about “unidentified
summary: About 20 witnesses in Montes Claros MG observed 8 silver star-like UFOs flying in Southern Cross formation then dispersing for 90 minutes on June 5, 1986.
